data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Spotify uses encryption to protect data between clients and servers ensuring secure data transfer.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 is used for data in transit protection with regular updates for vulnerabilities.

data.title: Zero Trust Architecture
data.description: Implements a zero-trust security model requiring verification for every access attempt within internal networks.
data.technical_spec: Identity and Access Management (IAM) solutions are used to apply principles of least privilege.

data.title: Security Incident and Event Management
data.description: Proactive monitoring system in place to detect and respond to security incidents in real-time.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Splunk and custom-built tools to consolidate logging and event management.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security audits and utilizes third-party services to assess vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated and manual testing methods to evaluate infrastructure and application security.

data.title: Data Anonymization and Protection
data.description: Ensures user data is anonymized to protect privacy and comply with regulations like GDPR.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes data masking technologies and practices to remove personally identifiable information.
